arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal, Aston Villa & Man City Possible Champions League Round of 16 Draws
arts.sum: All five British clubs made it through the League Phase of the Champions League - and now have a better idea of who they'll face in the next stage.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals huge Arsenal injury scare ahead of crunch Man City clash
arts.sum: Arsenal are safely through to the next round of the Champions League but David Raya was absent for their win over Girona and is a doubt for Sunday's meeting with Manchester City

arts.ttl: Mateo Kovacic reacts as Man City discover potential Champions League opponents: 'It doesn't matter'
arts.sum: Man City are guaranteed a tough assignment in the Champions League play-off round

arts.ttl: Manchester City given nightmare Champions League draw
arts.sum: If City are drawn against Real Madrid it will be the fourth successive year in which the two clubs have gone head-to-head in the knock-out rounds of the Champions League. It’s been a season of underperformance for Manchester City but they have booked their place in the Champions League knock-out rounds.

arts.ttl: Man City 3-1 Club Brugge: Match report & talking points from Cityzens' crucial comeback
arts.sum: Match report and three key takeaways from Man City 3-1 Club Brugge on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Man City 3-1 Club Brugge: Player ratings as Cityzens scrape Champions League knockout place
arts.sum: Player ratings from Man City 3-1 Club Brugge on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Man City 3-1 Club Brugge: Pep Guardiola's side come from behind to qualify for Champions League play-off
arts.sum: City survive major scare to keep Champions League hopes alive

arts.ttl: Man City 3-1 Club Brugge: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Savinho makes the difference from the bench
arts.sum: Manchester City complete a dramatic turnaround victory to beat Club Brugge 3-1, securing their progression into the Champions League knockout rounds.

arts.ttl: Man City 3-1 Club Brugge: Mateo Kovacic and Savinho ensure Pep Guardiola's side progress in do-or-die Champions League clash
arts.sum: MANCHESTER CITY 3-1 CLUB BRUGGE - OLIVER HOLT AT THE ETIHAD STADIUM: We need not have worried. Pep Guardiola need not have worried as they came from behind to win.

arts.ttl: Who Are Manchester City Playing in the Champions League Knockout Stage?
arts.sum: Manchester City avoided a catastrophic early exit from the Champions League and defeated Club Brugge to advance to the playoff round of the competition.
